---
title: "William Wither Bramston Beach"
---

## William Wither Bramston Beach

**Dates:** (1826-1901)

### Description

M. P. for North Hampshire 1857- 1885, then MP for Andover till his death, he was Father of the House of Commons (longest-serving member) when he died.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
